description: A planner uses LiDAR data to identify trees that are encroaching on transmission line right-of-ways and need to be trimmed.

nodes.task_description: Process aerial LiDAR data for a transmission corridor.

expected_outcome.value: System creates a 3D point cloud of the corridor, including conductors and vegetation.

nodes.task_description: Analyze the data to identify any vegetation that violates the minimum clearance distance to the conductors.

expected_outcome.value: System identifies 25 specific trees that are inside the clearance zone.

nodes.task_description: Generate work orders for the vegetation management crews, including maps and GPS coordinates for each tree that needs to be trimmed.

expected_outcome.value: System creates and dispatches prioritized work orders.
